properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What a celebration on that day. You know it can't be far away. Heaven's Bridegroom has descended, The ransomed Bride of God ascends; Heaven's bell will sweetly ring, Choir of angels start to sing, Pick up that trumpet, Gabriel, and blow.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here comes the Bride to be ever at His side Oh, what a spotless Bride! Oh, what a glorious sight! Here comes the chosen ones, Here comes the ransomed ones, Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Oh happy day, what a happy day!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Some from every nation will be there, Wearing spotless robes so bright and fair. All of heaven will behold, The Bride is marching down the streets of gold, Getting ready now to go, The very hour no one seems to know, Pick up that trumpet, Gabriel, and blow.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Bro. Branham saw them in preview But here we are now in view All of heaven will behold The Bride is marching down the streets of gold Getting ready now to go The very hour no one seems to know Pick up that trumpet, Gabriel, and blow.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Oh happy day, what a happy day! Oh happy day, what a happy day!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Angels step aside for here comes the Bride Angels step aside for here comes the Bride!
